patches.find: to better than 0.1% at seven of nine stations and within 1.8% at the worst
patches.replace: to better than 0.6% at seven of nine stations and within 2.78% at the worst
patches.rationale: ISS-1439: quantitative precision correction. Curmudgeon c6 H4 independent recompute shows 0.1%/1.8% should be 0.6%/2.78%. Two-word substitution.

patches.find: incomplete post-glacial isostatic adjustment from the Last Glacial Maximum ice sheet, measured directly by GRACE satellite gravimetry (Shepherd et al., 2012, Science)
patches.replace: incomplete post-glacial isostatic adjustment from the Last Glacial Maximum ice sheet, constrained by GRACE satellite gravimetry of ice-sheet mass balance (Shepherd et al., 2012, Science — ice-sheet mass loss; GIA adjustment modeled from LGM deglaciation loading history)
patches.rationale: ISS-1358/1375: Shepherd et al. 2012 measures ice-sheet mass balance, not GIA per se. Updated language to accurately describe what the citation measures ('constrained by GRACE gravimetry of ice-sheet mass balance') and notes the GIA is modeled. Fixes both ISS-1358 and ISS-1375 (duplicate issues on same problem). No new citation needed — the existing Shepherd citation is accurate for ice-sheet mass balance; the error was in calling it a direct GIA measurement.
ISS-1444: SAA American cell centre was '~80°W', imprecise/too-western. Recent WMM/CHAOS-7 outputs (2020-2025) place centroid ~60-70°W. Updated to '~65-70°W' per curmudgeon c4 H4 recommendation.
